calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha , CSR: Lavena Ward #7077 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner, GUO HUA WU, is appearing in propia persona.

Cantonese Interpreter, Nelson Mok, is present to interpret for the petitioner.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name. GUO HUA WU is sworn and examined by the Court through the Cantonese interpreter.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the change of name at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: KWOK WAH NG. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.
